nasb.text: Now they were seated before him, the firstborn according to his birthright and the youngest according to his youth, and the men looked at one another in astonishment.

esv.text: And they sat before him, the firstborn according to his birthright and the youngest according to his youth. And the men looked at one another in amazement.

cnv.text: 約瑟使眾兄弟在他面前排列坐下，都是照著他們長幼的次序。眾兄弟就彼此對望，驚奇不已。

ccb.text: 约瑟让他的弟兄们在他对面按照长幼次序坐，他们面面相觑，非常惊讶。

csbs.text: 他们被领到各自的座位上，从长子到幼子，照着长幼次序坐在约瑟面前。他们彼此对望，感到惊奇。
